overview: A personal portfolio website for Aditi Jadhav — aspiring software developer and first-year CS student. Features a hero section, about bio, skills showcase, goals, education timeline, and contact links, all styled in a sleek OLED black and sky blue color palette.
features: Hero section with name, tagline, and Contact Me button
Skills showcase with core strengths and technical skills
Goals section with four key objectives
Contact section with email, LinkedIn, and GitHub links
Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
OLED black and sky blue color palette
